description_long: This object is a stylized sunflower with a large, circular, yellow-brown central disk surrounded by evenly spaced, broad yellow petals. The flower head is supported by a long, straight green stem that features three pairs of opposite, angular leaves, each with a geometric, almost polygonal shape. The petals are arranged radially around the disk, giving the flower a symmetrical and sun-like appearance. The back of the flower head shows a green calyx structure, and the stem is segmented with clear nodes where the leaves attach. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, with a focus on bold shapes and clean lines. This flower would be a prominent decorative element in urban parks, gardens, or sidewalk planters.
description: A stylized sunflower with a large yellow-brown disk, radial yellow petals, and a tall green stem with angular leaves. The design is geometric and visually bold.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sunflower face, central disk, and all three pairs of angular leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the flower head and the staggered arrangement of the leaves along the stem.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flower head, green calyx, and the symmetrical arrangement of leaves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flower's profile and the geometric leaf structure.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration around the central disk, with each petal evenly spaced and not overlapping, creating a symmetrical, daisy-like whorl typical of sunflowers.
